reviews.title: Nice hotel but some service was disappointing
reviews.text: The transfer was 45 minutes late to pick us up from the airport. It took several phone calls to find out how long until we were to be picked up. Reception staff were very apologetic and looked after us when we arrived. Tried to order some lunch at the poolside but the stsff didnt want to walk over to where i was sitting to bring it to me. The Christmas dinner and entertainment was excellent. Overall the stay was good.
reviews.positives: Beautiful rooms and an excellent pool

reviews.title: Very good and worhty hotel for vacation
reviews.text: Though the distance to Aonang beach is pretty far (20 mins by hotel shuttle), but it's worthy to stay in such nice hotel, big swimming pool, and lot of activities arranged by hotel, which made your vacation really relaxed and enjoyable. Will come back if have plan to visit Krabi again.
reviews.positives: Very nice hotel stuff, good service, and nice hotel.

reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel
reviews.text: We had an enjoyable 3 day break at the Sofitel resort.  On arrival, we were immediately up graded.  The room was spacious and over looked the small golf course.  The best feature was the pool, the largest in Thailand.  Food was expensive compared to other hotels but there are a number of small restaurants within walking distance.  A great place to relax at the end of a busy holiday.
reviews.positives: Huge Swimming Pool

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with great hospitality and smiles
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a quiet location away from Ao Nang which is touristic. The hotel shutter to and from Ao Nang makes it convenient if you want to go out for lunch and dinner with more varieties and economical prices (although the shutter costs per person per way). All hotel facilities are clean and oriental. Big pool and plenty of space for sunbathing. The best rated for our stay is the hospitality and smiles from the hotel staff, making you feel too important sometimes :)
reviews.positives: Very friendly and attentive staff, cozy ambient, big swimming pool and happy hour drinks
reviews.negatives: Food in the hotel is quite expensive (for Thais at least), no in-room music

reviews.title: Sofitel Paradise
reviews.text: The hotel itself is lovely. It's set in beautiful surroundings. The hotel lobby is open plan and it looks on to the sea which is lovely. The rooms are spacious and clean, and the staff are very attentive. The swimming pool is amazing. Amazing choice for breakfast it's not the best I've ever had but it won't disappoint. If you are looking for tranquility this is the place to stay. There really isn't much to dislike about the Hotel. The only thing I would say is Sofitel charge you for transfer to Au nang. Personally I think this service should be complimentary considering the price you pay for the hotel. The only other thing I would say is that Klong Muang beach is not very nice! but I do think the hotel makes up for it by having the largest swimming pool in Thailand and also offers a free transfer to Hong Island which has a beautiful beach and perfect setting for sunbathing and snorkeling.
reviews.positives: Set in beautiful surroundings. Staff very attentive and respectful. Largest Swimming pool in Thailand. Hotel offers complimentary transfer to Hong Island. Good value for money
reviews.negatives:
Lack of local shops/restaurants near hotel.
Klong Muang beach is horrible.
Charges for transfers to Au Nang.

reviews.title: Nice place - good service
reviews.text: The hotel can be found in a quite and secluded place of Krabi province, however, it also means that there aren't many attractions nearby the hotel. Fortunately two really good restaurants are only minutes away - the Krabi Sand and Joo's kitchen. Though the Sofitel's beach isn't really attractive, you won't be bothered by that since the pool is excellent. Furthermore, Sofitel operates a daily free shuttle boat service to Hong Island, which has a really nice beach to swim, snorkel or simply lie down.
reviews.positives: Great pool and superb shuttle boat service to Hong Island.
reviews.negatives: The restaurants of the hotel are not only expensive (comparing to other restaurants in the neighborhood), but also not the best in quality.
